final:
module RefModule
(
    input clk,
    input we,
    input [8:0] addr,
    input [31:0] wdata,
    output reg [31:0] rdata
);

reg [31:0] ram [511:0];

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (we) begin
        ram[addr] <= wdata;
    end
    rdata <= ram[addr];
end

endmodule
